visual_findings.label: Facial expression
visual_findings.summary: Neutral to slightly tired expression; minimal emotional reactivity observed.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient maintains steady gaze toward camera; no visible signs of distress, confusion, or agitation.

visual_findings.label: Gaze and attention
visual_findings.summary: Consistent eye contact with camera; no signs of disengagement or wandering attention.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient looks directly at the camera throughout the clip; head position stable.

body_findings.label: Posture and movement
body_findings.summary: Patient is seated or reclining with minimal movement; no signs of restlessness or motor impairment.
body_findings.evidence: Patient remains relatively still; hand rests near face but no fidgeting or repetitive motion observed.

voice_findings.label: Speech clarity
voice_findings.summary: Speech is clear and intelligible; no signs of slurring, hesitations, or disorganized syntax.
voice_findings.evidence: Patient says: 'Hello, my name is Tony.' — speech is fluent, with normal pacing and articulation.

content_findings.label: Self-introduction
content_findings.summary: Patient provides name and greeting in a coherent, self-directed manner.
content_findings.evidence: Patient states: 'Hello, my name is Tony.' — no signs of confusion, repetition, or memory lapse.

screening_summary: The patient demonstrates clear speech, consistent attention, and neutral affect. No observable signs of cognitive impairment or emotional dysregulation are present in this single clip. The low-light setting limits visual detail but does not obscure key behavioral cues.
evidence_against_risk: Clear, fluent speech without disfluency or memory lapse
alternative_explanations: Low-light conditions may limit visual assessment depth
Single clip provides limited longitudinal or contextual data
emotional_assessment_findings: No visible signs of distress or anxiety
risk_control_suggestions: Consider follow-up in better lighting or with structured cognitive tasks
Monitor for functional changes over time if clinical concern persists
visit_recommendation: Routine follow-up or no further action required based on this clip alone.
future_risk_trend_summary: Insufficient data to predict future cognitive decline from a single clip.
context_notes: Clip is short and limited to self-introduction; no complex cognitive tasks performed.
Low-light conditions may affect visual detail but do not obscure key behavioral cues.
disclaimer: Research demo only. This output is not a diagnosis and must not be used as a standalone medical decision.
